calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Petitioner sworn and examined. The court ordered petitioner's name changed to Thomas Tomoyasu Sekine. Decree signed.
